title: *OUTDATED* Skyblock Latest Version
description:
**OUTDATED**
1.21 Skyblock modpack for both types of people (Foraging update use only and All rounder pack)
These mods are also used by various YouTubers such as Candypatt and V1dd, and Toadstar0
body:
# 🛡️ Skyblock Modpack (1.21)

Experience Skyblock like never before with this optimized **1.21 modpack** designed for performance, utility, and Skyblock-specific enhancements. Whether you're grinding skills, flipping on the AH, or taking down bosses, this pack gives you the edge.

This pack is used by Candypatt and V1dd, also recieved feedback from Toadstar0.
For Candypatt's original video, click [here!](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HLCCrhgmfI4)

## 🎯 Features

- ⚙️ **Custom Skyblock GUI Enhancements**  
  Cleaner inventory, item stats, and reforge overlays.

- 💰 **Auction & Bazaar Helpers**  
  View profit margins, price trends, and quick sell/buy suggestions.

- 🛑 **QoL Mods**  
  Dungeon utilities, ability cooldowns, health overlays, and more.

- 🚀 **FPS Boosted Performance**  
  Sodium, Lithium, and other optimization mods built for smooth gameplay.

- 📦 **Skyblock-Specific Addons**  
  Integrated support for **NEU**, **Skytils**, **DSM**, **ChatTriggers**, and others.

## 🔧 Requirements

- Minecraft **1.21.5**
- Fabric Loader
- 4GB+ RAM Recommended

## 📌 Note

✅ Fully compliant with Hypixel rules.  
❌ No macros, cheats, or blacklisted modifications included.

---

Enjoy faster, smarter Skyblock gameplay with everything you need — and nothing you don't.
